theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) mixed with trust-centric utility
theme_and_archetype.rationale: Govardhan is a holy city. The app needs to feel devotional, welcoming, and safe without relying on cliché pure saffron. We blend warm earthy tones with high-contrast elements for outdoor visibility and ride-hailing reliability.

iconography.rationale: Feather icons provide a premium, lightweight feel that counters the heavy text and buttons, bringing balance to the organic UI.

buttons.primary: bg: primary, radius: pill, paddingVertical: 16, text: text_inverse, fontWeight: 700. Add subtle scale down on press.
buttons.secondary: bg: primary_light, radius: pill, paddingVertical: 16, text: primary_dark, fontWeight: 700.
buttons.outline: bg: transparent, border: 1px solid border, radius: pill, paddingVertical: 16, text: text_main

cards.base: bg: surface, radius: lg, padding: lg, shadow: sm, border: 1px solid border
cards.service_tile: Vertical layout, icon top-left, title bold, subtle background tint for Parikrama tiles (primary_light).

inputs.text_field: bg: surface, border: 1px solid border, radius: md, padding: 16, fontSize: 16. Focus state: border: primary, borderWidth: 2
inputs.otp_box: Size: 56x56, text: h2 centered, border: 1px solid border, radius: md. Focus: border: primary.

status_pill.requested: bg: #FFF9C4, text: #F57F17, radius: pill, paddingHorizontal: 12, paddingVertical: 6

timeline.container: Left border 2px solid border, relative positioning
timeline.node: Absolute left: -9px, width 16px, height 16px, radius pill, bg: surface, border: 4px solid primary

bottom_sheet.style: bg: surface, borderTopLeftRadius: bottom_sheet, borderTopRightRadius: bottom_sheet, shadow: md
bottom_sheet.indicator: width: 40, height: 4, bg: border, radius: pill, alignSelf: center, marginTop: 12

Splash.layout: Full-screen background image (Temple sunset) with dark overlay (bg-black/40). TirthRide logo centered (text_inverse, h1).

RoleSelection.layout: Bottom sheet style container over a soft background. Three large vertical cards: Passenger, Driver, Admin. Cards have icon and label.

OTPFlow.layout: Header: 'Enter Mobile Number'. Subtitle: 'OTP will be sent'. Input: Large text field with +91 prefix. Button: Primary CTA at the bottom. Next screen: 4-6 OTP boxes.

PassengerHome.layout: Top: Greeting + Profile avatar. Body: 'Where to?' section. Grid of 3 Service Tiles: 1 wide tile for 'Local Transport', 2 side-by-side tiles for 'Poochari (12km)' and 'Radhakund (7km)'. Bottom tab bar.

ServiceSelection.layout: If Local: Pickup/Drop location inputs (mimic Google Places). If Parikrama: Details of route, estimated time, and fare. CTA: 'Confirm & Find Driver'.

BookingScreen.layout: No live map. Use a prominent Status Timeline (Searching -> Driver Accepted -> Arriving). Show Driver Card (Photo, Name, Vehicle No, Rating) once accepted. Pin code displayed prominently (h1).

RideTracking.layout: Status updates in real-time. Action buttons: 'Call Driver', 'Share Details'. Fare summary at bottom.

PastRides.layout: List view. Each item: Date, Route (Pickup to Drop), Fare, StatusPill (Completed/Cancelled).

Profile.layout: Avatar, Name, Phone. Menu items: Edit Profile, Payment Methods, App Language, Logout.

DriverHome.layout: Top: Large Online/Offline Toggle switch. Center: 'Looking for riders...' animation if online. Bottom: Earnings today summary card.

IncomingRideCard.layout: Modal/Bottom Sheet. Route: Pickup -> Drop. Est Fare. Distance. Two large buttons: 'Accept' (Primary), 'Pass' (Outline). Timer bar shrinking at top.

Earnings.layout: Top: Total Balance. CTA: 'Withdraw to UPI'. Graph/List of recent earnings per ride.

KYCUploadFlow.layout: Step-by-step wizard. Step 1: Aadhar (Front/Back upload areas). Step 2: Vehicle RC. Step 3: Profile Photo. Step 4: UPI ID. Use dashed borders for upload zones.

AdminDashboard.layout: Metrics Grid: Total Rides, Active Drivers, Revenue. Quick Links: Pending Approvals, Audit Logs.

AdminFareConfig.layout: List of editable fields: Base Fare, Per Km, Commission %, Parikrama Package 1 Fare, etc. CTA: 'Save Changes'.

DriverApprovalList.layout: List of pending drivers. Tap to expand: shows Aadhar, RC images, UPI. Action: Approve (Green) or Reject (Red).

AuditLog.layout: Detailed table/list of all rides. Search bar by ride ID. Filters: Date, Status, Driver.

micro_interactions.button_press: Scale transform to 0.96 with spring physics (friction: 5, tension: 40).
micro_interactions.bottom_sheet_enter: Slide up from bottom with spring animation. Background overlay fades in to opacity 0.5.
micro_interactions.ride_match_pulse: Concentric circles expanding from the center icon, fading out (opacity 1 to 0, scale 1 to 2) over 1.5s.
micro_interactions.otp_focus: Border color transitions to primary, slight elevation increase.

testID_conventions.rule: Every button, input, card, and modal MUST have a data-testid assigned for QA automation.

hero_splash_background.description: Sunset over Indian architecture/temples, sets a calm, devotional, and premium tone for the splash screen.

driver_empty_state.description: Indian e-rickshaw image, useful for Driver Home empty states or KYC onboarding background.

parikrama_package_cover.description: Temple bells silhouette. Use as a background or thumbnail for the Parikrama Package cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard React Native `StyleSheet` or `NativeWind` depending on the project setup, mapping the JSON tokens strictly.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000) or pure white for the app background. Stick to the `background_base` (#FAFAF5) and `text_main` (#1A2421) values.
Implement the `StatusTimeline` component natively using View borders and absolute positioning, do not rely on heavy external map libraries for standard tracking views as requested.
Ensure all touchable areas have a minimum height of 48px for accessibility.
Apply `data-testid` (or `testID` in React Native) to every interactive component.
For icons, install `@expo/vector-icons` and strictly use the `Feather` library to maintain the elegant UI.
